title: Decode the Roman Pattern
prompt: Given: I=1, V=5, X=10. What is XLII?

title: Mayan Bars and Dots
prompt: Interpret the glyph: --.. | ... (bars '-' =5, dots '.' =1, '|' separates places)
example: --.. = 5+5+2 =12 in first place; then multiply by 20 etc.

title: Babylonian Place Value
prompt: If [1][30] is a Babylonian number, what is it in Arabic?
